hero.role: Multiplatform and high-reliability backend systems developer.

featured.title: VESPERA SOLUTIONS
featured.verbo: ERP built during internship. Replaces 5+ disconnected tools with one system: sales, purchases, warehouse, treasury. Real-time stock tracking, AI-powered insights, Telegram bot for instant KPI checks.

projects.title: VALAQUIA STORE
projects.verbo: Full-stack game store. Android client + Spring Boot REST API. Game catalog, health tips per game, SHA-256 secure downloads.

projects.title: BOOK & BUGS
projects.verbo: Library management in 2 versions. PHP MVC web + JavaFX desktop. User auth, CRUD, connection pooling with DBCP2, consistent JSON contract.

projects.title: DIY TOOLS
projects.verbo: Inventory + order management for DIY tools shop. Customer-facing ordering, admin fulfillment, stock tracking.

projects.title: ECODRIVE ADV
projects.verbo: EV discovery platform with integrated MOVES plan guidance. Helps customers make informed decisions and plan EV purchases.

about.bio_1: I am a developer specialized in multiplatform application development, passionate about creating efficient and adaptable solutions that provide real value to users. I consider myself a curious and constantly learning person, always keeping up with the latest technological trends to stay updated and apply the best in each project.
about.bio_2: Besides programming, sports and discipline are an essential part of my life, qualities I bring into my daily work: consistency, organization, and commitment to achieving ambitious goals.
about.bio_3: I am motivated to be part of projects where I can contribute innovation, work in a team, and continue growing professionally, always aiming for technical excellence and continuous improvement.
about.bio_4: I also explore AI-driven development workflows, agent orchestration (Hermes Agent, n8n) and Spec/Test-Driven Development methodologies to build smarter, more reliable software.

contact.headline: LETS BUILD
contact.built_with: BUILT WITH CLAUDE CODE AND OPENCODE
